pillars.name: Leadership
pillars.description: Enterprise strategy, financial stewardship, and external representation

pillars.name: Meaning — Brand & Product Engine
pillars.description: Everything that makes Vosges mean something in the market — product, brand, creative, DTC

pillars.name: Selling — Sales Engine
pillars.description: B2B sales, corporate gifting, wholesale, private label, and retail boutiques

pillars.name: Making — Operations Engine
pillars.description: Production, fulfillment, procurement, QA, customer service — everything that delivers the promise

pillars.name: Connective Services
pillars.description: Functions that serve every pillar — HR, Technology

roles.title: Chief Executive Officer
roles.purposeOfRole: Set the company's strategic direction, steward the brand's identity and long-term value, and ensure Vosges Haut-Chocolat fulfills its potential as a luxury brand.
roles.jobDescription: Define and hold the multi-year strategic roadmap. Own financial stewardship — P&L, capital structure, and investor/owner relationships. Build and retain the executive team. Represent the brand externally.
roles.note: CEO scorecard focuses on STRATEGIC leadership, not day-to-day operations.

initiatives.name: Own the 3-year strategic plan
initiatives.desiredResult: Hold and evolve the multi-year roadmap that ties brand, portfolio, channel mix, and margin profile together. Partner with COO on execution translation.
initiatives.successMetric: Strategic plan documented, dated, and reviewed with LT quarterly. Annual priorities traceable to the plan. 90% of execution traceable to strategic intent.

initiatives.name: Steward brand and portfolio integrity
initiatives.desiredResult: Be the final guardian of what Vosges means in the market. Validate major brand, product, and channel decisions against brand standards.
initiatives.successMetric: Every major brand, product, and channel decision reviewed against a written brand framework. Zero brand-dilutive launches.

initiatives.name: Build and retain the executive team
initiatives.desiredResult: Hire, calibrate, and hold the standard for the top layer of the organization. Coach direct reports on scorecards.
initiatives.successMetric: Executive seats filled with A-players within 90 days of vacancy. No direct report without a scorecard coaching cycle.

initiatives.name: Own financial stewardship and owner alignment
initiatives.desiredResult: Hold P&L ownership at the enterprise level. Partner with the COO and Finance on capital structure, cash management, and investor relations.
initiatives.successMetric: Annual budget on time with scenario ranges. Monthly close reviewed with ownership. Cash runway ≥6 months.

initiatives.name: Represent Vosges externally
initiatives.desiredResult: Be the face of the brand with trade partners, press, key accounts, and the luxury market.
initiatives.successMetric: ≥12 strategic relationships actively cultivated in 2026. Each external commitment traceable to strategic plan.

skills: Brand instinct paired with commercial discipline

roles.title: Chief Operating Officer
roles.purposeOfRole: Operationalize enterprise strategy — make sure the company delivers on what it promises customers, keeps unit economics healthy, and builds capabilities for the next chapter.
roles.jobDescription: Own execution across Operations, Supply Chain, Quality, Customer Service, and Technology. Partner with the CEO on strategy; translate it into operating plans.
roles.note: COO scorecard focuses on STRATEGIC operating leadership — building the operating system, not doing the work.

initiatives.name: Hold operating leaders accountable to scorecards and OKRs
initiatives.desiredResult: Run the scorecard and OKR framework as a management system. Every direct report has an active scorecard and quarterly coaching review.
initiatives.successMetric: Every direct report has an active scorecard and quarterly coaching review. Off-track items escalated within one cycle.

initiatives.name: Protect enterprise gross margin through operating discipline
initiatives.desiredResult: Partner with Finance, Procurement, and Operations to protect gross margin through lean practices and waste reduction.
initiatives.successMetric: Gross margin at or above plan by channel. Zero major margin surprises after month-end.

initiatives.name: Own the end-to-end customer fulfillment promise
initiatives.desiredResult: Be accountable for the experience the customer actually receives — lead times, shipping accuracy, and service quality.
initiatives.successMetric: OTIF at or above target by channel every month. Customer-facing failures tracked and root-caused.

initiatives.name: Sponsor the capability build-out the next chapter requires
initiatives.desiredResult: Identify the 3–5 capability gaps (B2B infrastructure, forecasting, BOMs 2.0, data integration) and ensure each has an owner, a deadline, and resources.
initiatives.successMetric: Capability portfolio published and reviewed quarterly. Each project has owner, deadline, and resources.

skills: Operating-system thinking — building cadence and holding it
Cross-functional leadership across Ops, Tech, and Customer

roles.title: Director of Ecom
roles.purposeOfRole: Lead Vosges' direct-to-consumer Ecom + Brand engine — owning the commercial narrative, product roadmap, and customer experience across DTC channels.
roles.jobDescription: Own the DTC number. Steward brand voice end-to-end. Lead the product roadmap through the Senior Product Manager. Partner with Operations on launches.
roles.note: Consolidated leadership of Brand, Product, and DTC Ecom under a single accountable seat.

initiatives.name: Hit the DTC revenue plan
initiatives.desiredResult: Own the DTC number. Build and run the merchandising and promotional calendar.
initiatives.successMetric: DTC revenue at or above plan by quarter. Conversion rate trending up YoY. AOV at or above plan.

initiatives.name: Hold the 12–18 month product roadmap
initiatives.desiredResult: Partner with the Senior Product Manager on a published roadmap that reflects strategic priorities.
initiatives.successMetric: Roadmap reviewed with LT quarterly. Every active concept has a named Stage-Gate status.

initiatives.name: Steward brand voice end-to-end
initiatives.desiredResult: Partner with Art Director, Marketing Manager, and CEO on brand-voice consistency.
initiatives.successMetric: Brand voice guidelines documented and referenced in every creative brief.

initiatives.name: Land the 2026 launch calendar on time, on brand, on margin
initiatives.desiredResult: Drive Holiday 2026, grab-and-go, and seasonal launches through the org.
initiatives.successMetric: Holiday 2026 shipped on schedule with ≥95% of SKUs hitting planned launch date.

initiatives.name: Run peak-season without operational failure
initiatives.desiredResult: Partner with Operations, NPD, and Customer Service on peak-period readiness.
initiatives.successMetric: Holiday and Mother's Day peaks run within plan. OTIF ≥ target through peak.

skills: DTC e-commerce leadership on Shopify Plus
Brand + product + commercial fluency in a single seat

roles.title: Director of Sales
roles.location: Chicago (on-site initially, hybrid eligible after onboarding)
roles.purposeOfRole: Lead the B2B Sales organization — ensuring salespeople have the tools, processes, and support they need to capture and protect revenue.
roles.jobDescription: Build and lead the B2B Sales organization, starting with Corporate Gifting and extending into Wholesale and Private Label.
roles.note: Andy's gold-standard scorecard — the structural reference for every other role.

initiatives.name: Establish and lead the B2B Sales organization structure
initiatives.desiredResult: Build the foundation — Sales Ops support, defined roles, training, and pipeline management.
initiatives.successMetric: B2B Sales org fully operational with clear accountability. Salespeople focused exclusively on selling.

initiatives.name: Partner with Director of Operations on SLAs
initiatives.desiredResult: Define mutual commitments between Sales and Operations — lead times, cutoffs, escalation paths.
initiatives.successMetric: Documented SLAs in place and honored by both sides. Weekly Sales & Ops meeting running.

initiatives.name: Reconfigure HubSpot for B2B
initiatives.desiredResult: Partner with Head of Technology to rebuild HubSpot with proper pipelines and stages.
initiatives.successMetric: B2B pipeline live with win/loss tracking. Weekly reporting on pipeline health.

initiatives.name: Establish standardized B2B offering and sales materials
initiatives.desiredResult: Define approved configurations, customization rules, lead times, MOQs, and pricing tiers.
initiatives.successMetric: Published B2B catalog/menu live in 2026. Salespeople can confidently commit to customers.

initiatives.name: Protect B2B revenue through risk management
initiatives.desiredResult: Build the visibility and cadence that flags at-risk orders before the customer feels it.
initiatives.successMetric: Fulfillment-driven sales losses down 50% vs H2 2025. Risks flagged ≥48 hours ahead.

skills: B2B sales leadership with cross-functional influence

roles.title: Retail Sales GM
roles.purposeOfRole: Own the P&L and customer experience of the retail boutiques — from flagship to airport — ensuring every Vosges location amplifies the brand and drives revenue.
roles.jobDescription: Drive revenue and margin across all boutiques. Hire, train, and develop boutique leadership. Use airport locations as brand amplifiers to drive e-commerce adoption.
roles.note: Title changed from 'Regional General Manager' to 'Retail Sales GM' per FigJam. Andy requested new title — all stores are in one city. Focus shifted from 'theater of chocolate' to foot traffic and brand amplification at O'Hare.

initiatives.name: Hit retail revenue + margin plan
initiatives.desiredResult: Own the multi-unit P&L. Manage labor cost. Hit contribution margin by unit.
initiatives.successMetric: Retail revenue at or above plan by unit. Labor-as-percent-of-revenue within target.

initiatives.name: Increase foot traffic and transaction value at O'Hare boutiques
initiatives.desiredResult: Use airport presence to amplify the brand to non-Chicago travelers. Turn boutique customers into e-commerce customers.
initiatives.successMetric: Foot traffic trending up QoQ. Average transaction value increasing. Measurable e-commerce conversion from boutique interactions.

roles.title: HR Manager
roles.purposeOfRole: Build and steward Vosges as a place where people can do the best work of their careers.
roles.jobDescription: Own end-to-end people operations: recruiting, onboarding, benefits, payroll oversight, compliance, performance management, and culture.
roles.note: Connective service — reports to CEO, serves every function.

initiatives.name: Steward the scorecard-and-OKR operating system
initiatives.desiredResult: Train managers on scorecards, OKRs, and 1:1s. Make every leader use them — not as a document, as a practice.
initiatives.successMetric: 100% of LT on active scorecards with quarterly coaching. Manager certification on the system completed by Q2.

roles.title: Senior Product Manager
roles.purposeOfRole: Lead New Product Development for Vosges — owning the portfolio strategy, product roadmap, and Stage-Gate process.
roles.jobDescription: Define and hold the 12–18 month product roadmap. Own Stage-Gate. Partner with the Chef / R&D Director on recipe and feasibility. Coach the R&D team and run the taste test program.
roles.note: Peer to Chef / R&D Director; both report to Director of Ecom. Takes on taste test program and R&D coaching from Chef (per 04-18 review).

initiatives.name: Establish the 12–18 month product roadmap
initiatives.desiredResult: Publish and update the roadmap quarterly. Balance load against team capacity. Achieve the roadmap by end of 2026.
initiatives.successMetric: Roadmap reviewed with LT quarterly. Every active concept has named Stage-Gate status.

initiatives.name: Run the taste test program and coach R&D team
initiatives.desiredResult: Own sensory evaluation. Build the R&D team's capability (moved from Chef per 04-18 review).
initiatives.successMetric: Taste test cadence held. R&D team receiving regular coaching.

initiatives.name: Partner with Chef on SKU rationalization
initiatives.desiredResult: Complete a robust SKU rationalization for 2026.
initiatives.successMetric: Rationalization framework published. Target portfolio size achieved.

roles.title: Performance Marketing Manager
roles.purposeOfRole: Own paid acquisition, CRM performance, and attribution analytics for Vosges DTC.
roles.jobDescription: Own paid media (Meta, Google, programmatic), SEO, affiliate, and CRM performance. Run attribution and cohort analysis.
roles.note: Performance-focused counterpart to the Marketing Manager (brand + content side).

initiatives.name: Hit blended ROAS target
initiatives.desiredResult: Own paid social, search, and display. Drive daily channel optimization.
initiatives.successMetric: Blended ROAS at or above plan quarterly. Channel-level ROAS within target.

roles.title: Ecom Manager
roles.purposeOfRole: Run the day-to-day of the Vosges Shopify Plus storefront — merchandising, site operations, conversion optimization.
roles.jobDescription: Own Shopify Plus day-to-day: product data, collections, merchandising, site content, pricing, promo setup. Own the sales-related technology stack.
roles.note: Operational counterpart to the Director of Ecom — the hands on Shopify every day. Per 04-18 review: owns sales-related tech, works closely with Customer Tech Ops.

initiatives.name: Hit the Shopify Plus DTC plan
initiatives.desiredResult: Own site merchandising, promo execution, and daily trading rhythm.
initiatives.successMetric: DTC revenue at or above plan monthly. Site trading reviewed daily.

roles.title: Marketing Manager
roles.purposeOfRole: Plan and execute the marketing calendar — campaigns, content, email, and brand storytelling.
roles.jobDescription: Own campaign strategy across seasonal launches and evergreen brand storytelling.
roles.note: Brand + content counterpart to Performance Marketing Manager.

initiatives.name: Deliver the 2026 campaign calendar
initiatives.desiredResult: Build, publish, and execute the full calendar.
initiatives.successMetric: 100% of campaigns launch on calendar date.

roles.title: Art Director
roles.purposeOfRole: Own the creative voice and visual identity of the Vosges brand.
roles.jobDescription: Direct the visual brand across packaging, site, email, paid, retail, and PR. Manage internal design team plus contractors.
roles.note: Creative authority; peer to Marketing Manager under Director of Ecom. Title may change to Creative Director (Jen's intent for Kelsey promotion — timing unclear).

initiatives.name: Steward the Vosges visual system
initiatives.desiredResult: Own the design system, component library, and brand standards.
initiatives.successMetric: Design system documented and adopted across teams. Quarterly updates shipped.

roles.title: Senior Designer
roles.purposeOfRole: Be the senior creative executor — leading hero campaign, packaging, and brand-system work under Art Director.
roles.jobDescription: Lead execution of high-visibility creative: hero campaign assets, packaging, brand-system evolution.
roles.note: Currently on contract. Intent: convert to FTE. Scorecard deferred pending Alyssa's Figma document.

initiatives.name: Lead hero campaign and launch creative
initiatives.desiredResult: Own design execution for every 2026 hero launch.
initiatives.successMetric: 100% of hero launches shipped on calendar. Zero launches missing senior creative leadership.

roles.title: Designer
roles.purposeOfRole: Be the day-to-day design executor across Vosges touchpoints.
roles.jobDescription: Execute brand-aligned design across campaign, email, social, site, and supporting packaging work.
roles.note: IC designer under Art Director. Scorecard deferred pending Alyssa's Figma document.

initiatives.name: Print + packaging ramp
initiatives.desiredResult: Develop advanced expertise in print and packaging.
initiatives.successMetric: Month 1 observation. Month 2 participating. Months 3–6 fully handling packaging projects.

roles.title: Chef / R&D Director
roles.purposeOfRole: Be the creative and technical flavor authority for Vosges — developing recipes, prototyping new formats, and ensuring the product is worthy of the brand.
roles.jobDescription: Lead chocolate and confectionery R&D. Formulate new recipes. Prototype, iterate, and hand off to production. Partner with Ops Manager on techniques and Senior Product Manager on SKU rationalization.
roles.note: KEY STRUCTURAL MOVE: Moves from Director of Operations (Steve) to Director of Ecom (Jen). Peer to Senior Product Manager. Not a team coach — coaching responsibilities moved to Sr Product Manager per 04-18 review.

initiatives.name: Deliver the R&D pipeline on-time, on-brand
initiatives.desiredResult: Move assigned concepts from prototype to Stage 4 on Stage-Gate timelines.
initiatives.successMetric: 100% Stage-4 delivery on schedule. Zero concepts stuck in prototype >90 days.

initiatives.name: Partner with Ops Manager to improve techniques and procedures
initiatives.desiredResult: Work with Melissa to improve production techniques and procedures for current products.
initiatives.successMetric: Measurable improvement in production consistency and quality.

initiatives.name: Partner with Sr Product Manager on SKU rationalization
initiatives.desiredResult: Complete a robust SKU rationalization for 2026.
initiatives.successMetric: Rationalization targets met. Portfolio streamlined.

currentState.note: Currently reports to Steve Palumbo (Director of Operations)

proposedState.note: Moves to Brand & Product Engine under Jen Hockey

roles.title: Product Operations Specialist
roles.purposeOfRole: Be the technical and data right-hand to the Senior Product Manager and Chef / R&D Director — owning BOMs, MRP, Flavor Studio, and Fishbowl data for NPD.
roles.jobDescription: Own BOMs, MRP logic, Flavor Studio recipe data, and Fishbowl product/costcode data. Partner with Chef and Ops Manager on improving bill of materials and procedures.
roles.note: Data/systems seat in the NPD three-seat team. Per 04-18 review: initiative changed from 'restart BOMs 2.0' to 'partner with Chef and Ops Mgr on improving BOMs and procedures.'

initiatives.name: Partner with Chef and Ops Manager on BOMs and procedures
initiatives.desiredResult: Support the improvement of bill of materials and production procedures.
initiatives.successMetric: Active SKUs with accurate BOMs in Fishbowl. Maintenance model documented.

roles.title: Junior Marketing Coordinator
roles.purposeOfRole: Support the Marketing Manager on campaign execution.
roles.jobDescription: Traffic creative assets, build and schedule emails, maintain the social calendar, write first-draft copy.
roles.note: Future role planned for end of 2026 as Marketing bandwidth expands.

initiatives.name: Execute campaign calendar tactics
initiatives.desiredResult: Build emails, social posts, and landing updates on schedule.
initiatives.successMetric: 100% of tactics shipped on calendar date. Zero missed sends.

roles.title: Sales Account Manager
roles.purposeOfRole: Carry a portfolio of Vosges B2B corporate-gifting accounts.
roles.jobDescription: Own a named book of corporate-gifting accounts. Prospect, pitch, and close new business. Grow existing accounts.
roles.note: Front-line seller role. Denise Saladino and Ian Thomas use this scorecard template for their Corporate Gifting roles.

initiatives.name: Hit B2B revenue quota
initiatives.desiredResult: Own assigned accounts. Grow existing. Prospect and close new.
initiatives.successMetric: Quota attainment ≥100% quarterly. Pipeline coverage ≥3x quarterly quota.

roles.title: Corporate Gifting
roles.purposeOfRole: Corporate gifting sales — uses Sales Account Manager scorecard.
roles.note: Uses Sales Account Manager scorecard template. Currently reports to CEO; moves to Director of Sales.

roles.title: Corporate Gifting
roles.purposeOfRole: Corporate gifting sales — uses Sales Account Manager scorecard.
roles.note: Uses Sales Account Manager scorecard template. Currently reports to CEO; moves to Director of Sales.

roles.title: Junior Account Manager
roles.purposeOfRole: Support Sales Account Managers and the Director of Sales — handling inbound leads, account research, proposal prep.
roles.jobDescription: Qualify inbound leads. Run account research. Prep proposals. Own follow-up on stalled deals.
roles.note: EOY 2026 hire. Per 04-18 review: 'Manage house accounts' removed — no house accounts in 2026. New focus: partner with ops for Q4 peak corporate gifting execution.

initiatives.name: Partner with operations for successful Q4 peak corporate gifting
initiatives.desiredResult: Ensure operational readiness for Q4 corporate gifting surge.
initiatives.successMetric: Q4 fulfillment targets met. Zero customer-facing failures from ops gaps.

roles.title: Wholesale & Private Label Sales
roles.purposeOfRole: Build Vosges' wholesale and private-label business.
roles.jobDescription: Own wholesale account acquisition and growth. Manage the Faire relationship alongside Prosper Lab. Develop private-label pipeline in partnership with COO.
roles.note: EOY 2026 hire. Per 04-18 review: co-owns private label opportunities with COO (Jay).

initiatives.name: Build the Wholesale and Private Label pipeline
initiatives.desiredResult: Source, qualify, and close wholesale and private-label accounts. Partner with Prosper Lab on Faire.
initiatives.successMetric: Pipeline value at or above plan quarterly. Closed-won revenue at or above plan.

roles.title: Director of Operations
roles.purposeOfRole: Serve as the strategic #2 to the COO for all of Operations — owning the integrated operating plan.
roles.jobDescription: Translate the COO's operating priorities into an integrated Operations plan. Run Production, Procurement, Quality, and Customer Service. Own the operations cadence.
roles.note: QA Manager and Customer Service Manager moved under this seat from COO. Per 04-18 review: absorbs 'install and run unified operating cadence' from COO.

initiatives.name: Run the integrated Operations plan
initiatives.desiredResult: Own a rolling 13-week production, fulfillment, and capacity plan. Install and run the unified operating cadence.
initiatives.successMetric: 13-week plan variance ≤10%. Weekly readout delivered on time.

roles.title: Ops Manager
roles.purposeOfRole: Run the day-to-day of the factory floor — production, assembly, fulfillment, warehouse, and maintenance.
roles.jobDescription: Be the senior presence on the floor. Own daily production huddles, shift handoffs, and execution. Partner with Customer Tech Ops on ShipStation and order-related tech issues.
roles.note: Floor lead — most senior operational presence in the building day-to-day.

initiatives.name: Hit daily and weekly production targets
initiatives.desiredResult: Run daily huddles and clean shift handoffs. Remove blockers in real time.
initiatives.successMetric: Weekly plan attainment ≥90%. Daily huddles held 5x/week.

roles.title: Fulfillment Supervisor
roles.purposeOfRole: Lead the daily execution of Vosges' pick / pack / ship operation.
roles.jobDescription: Own daily fulfillment — picking, packing, shipping — across DTC, B2B, wholesale, and retail replenishment.
roles.note: Floor-level fulfillment leader under Ops Manager.

initiatives.name: Ship orders on time, accurately
initiatives.desiredResult: Own daily pick, pack, label, and ship throughput.
initiatives.successMetric: Ship-on-time ≥98% daily. Peak throughput within plan.

roles.title: Procurement Manager
roles.purposeOfRole: Own end-to-end sourcing, purchasing, and inventory management.
roles.jobDescription: Lead sourcing and purchasing for all ingredients, packaging, and indirect materials. Manage vendor relationships. Own inventory levels.
roles.note: Title changed from 'Supply Chain Manager' to 'Procurement Manager'. Per 04-18 review: must include 'no out-of-stocks on everyday items' initiative. Owns stock-level OKRs for Dir Ops.

initiatives.name: Build vendor and sourcing strategy
initiatives.desiredResult: Segment vendors by criticality. Qualify dual sources on Class-A items.
initiatives.successMetric: 2+ qualified sources for every Class-A item.

initiatives.name: No out-of-stocks on everyday items
initiatives.desiredResult: Prevent stockouts on core/everyday SKUs. Own the stock-level OKRs.
initiatives.successMetric: Zero out-of-stocks on everyday items. OKR targets met.

roles.title: Inventory Specialist
roles.purposeOfRole: Own the data discipline of Vosges inventory — cycle counts, receiving accuracy, Fishbowl integrity.
roles.jobDescription: Execute cycle counts. Reconcile Fishbowl against physical inventory. Own receiving accuracy. Maintain reorder points.
roles.note: Reports to Procurement Manager. In Current state, was 'Fulfillment Supervisor' under Supply Chain — role refocused.

initiatives.name: Maintain Fishbowl inventory accuracy
initiatives.desiredResult: Run daily cycle counts on assigned zones. Reconcile variances within 48 hours.
initiatives.successMetric: Inventory accuracy ≥98% monthly. Variances resolved within 48 hours ≥95% of the time.

roles.title: QA Manager
roles.purposeOfRole: Protect Vosges customers, team members, and brand by owning food safety, quality assurance, and regulatory compliance.
roles.jobDescription: Own food safety (SQF, HACCP, GMP), quality assurance programs, and regulatory compliance.
roles.note: KEY STRUCTURAL MOVE: Moves from COO to Director of Operations. Consolidated QA leadership.

initiatives.name: Pass SQF with zero major NCs
initiatives.desiredResult: Mock audits, gap closure, training, and audit execution.
initiatives.successMetric: SQF passed on schedule with zero major non-conformances.

roles.title: Customer Service Manager
roles.purposeOfRole: Lead the Chocolate Concierge Department so every Vosges customer receives responsive, empathetic, brand-appropriate service.
roles.jobDescription: Manage and mentor the service team. Own CSAT, NPS, response-time, and contact-deflection KPIs.
roles.note: KEY STRUCTURAL MOVE: Moves from COO to Director of Operations. Partners closely with Customer Tech Operations.

initiatives.name: Hit CSAT, NPS, and response-time targets
initiatives.desiredResult: Own the top service KPIs. Build standards. Audit weekly.
initiatives.successMetric: First-response SLA met ≥95%. CSAT at or above target. NPS trending up QoQ.

roles.title: Head of Technology
roles.purposeOfRole: Own the technology backbone of Vosges — Shopify, Fishbowl, Flavor Studio, HubSpot, data integrations, infrastructure.
roles.jobDescription: Own technology strategy, architecture, vendor management, and data integration. Maintain and evolve the core stack.
roles.note: IT box on the org chart = this seat (per Andy). Connective service under COO.

initiatives.name: Publish the tech roadmap and architecture
initiatives.desiredResult: Document the current-state architecture. Build a 12-month roadmap tied to business outcomes.
initiatives.successMetric: Architecture and roadmap published and reviewed with LT quarterly.

roles.title: Customer Tech Operations
roles.purposeOfRole: Own the customer-facing technology stack — Gorgias, HubSpot (sales CRM, NOT service), Shopify integrations, Zest, ShipperHQ.
roles.jobDescription: Stabilize and maintain the customer-facing tech stack. Reduce WISMO tickets via Gorgias AI. Partner with Sales Director to enable HubSpot capabilities for lead capture and conversion.
roles.note: ⚠️ SCORECARD UNDER REVIEW (Andy flagged 2026-04-18). Uses Head of Technology scorecard via inheritance. Per 04-18 review: HubSpot is for sales CRM/B2B marketing, NOT service. Initiatives split: (1) Gorgias/WISMO reduction, (2) HubSpot strategic capabilities with Sales Director.

initiatives.name: Stabilize the customer-facing tech stack
initiatives.desiredResult: Audit every tool. Close gaps. Document owners and escalation paths.
initiatives.successMetric: Zero CX failures from misconfiguration by Q3. Tool inventory current.

initiatives.name: Reduce WISMO tickets and generate revenue via Gorgias AI
initiatives.desiredResult: Own 'Where Is My Order' ticket reduction using Gorgias AI capabilities.
initiatives.successMetric: WISMO ticket volume down QoQ. AI resolution rate trending up.

initiatives.name: Partner with Sales Director to enable HubSpot strategic capabilities
initiatives.desiredResult: Enable lead capture, prospecting, and deal closure workflows in HubSpot.
initiatives.successMetric: HubSpot pipelines live and adopted by sales team. Lead-to-close tracking operational.

currentState.note: Sarah B's role currently spans order processing and tech support — being refocused
